● nix run .#test is green. Two separate problems:

  1. The timeout/reload loop: Turbopack's persistent cache in frontend/.next/ held absolute paths from before the landing → site_conductor repo rename. Initial compile worked, but every HMR poll panicked (Next.js package not found, known issue #88019) → the client force-reloaded in an infinite loop → page.goto never
  saw a settled load. Fixed by wiping .next (and node_modules, re-npm ci'd from the committed lockfile — no leak outside nix-managed space; node inside is v22.22.2, resolution roots correctly at frontend/).
  2. A real visual diff on research, unmasked once the loop was gone: the issue-57 merge added a READ FULL REPORT button and a team_bio_* A/B experiment row. Accepted via nix run .#accept-test research.

  Only working-tree change is the updated tests/__screenshots__/research.png baseline — uncommitted, say the word if you want it committed.

✻ Baked for 5m 13s

※ recap: Fixed the failing nix run .#test: wiped stale .next cache, reinstalled deps, and accepted the new research screenshot baseline. All tests pass now; only next action is committing the updated research.png baseline if you want. (disable recaps in /config)
